display.name: Wrecked Bell Tower
display.short_description: A shattered bell tower leans over the treeline. The lee side offers shelter, and the cracked bell-mouth hides a purse wedged deep inside.

choices.label: Rest in the windbreak
choices.summary: Take the shelter under the fallen stones and steady yourself before moving on.

choices.label: Break the hidden purse free
choices.summary: Climb the ruin, reach into the bell-mouth, and take whatever the last ringer hid there.
